case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS WILLIAMS, DENICECE

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, DENICECE
